name: Lyra Quickfingers
description: *A lithe figure in dark leather sits in the shadows, daggers gleaming at her belt as she watches the room with calculating eyes.*

recruitment.success_text: Silvin smiles with catlike grace. 'Finally! Honest work that pays in adventure rather than coin. Count me in, boss.'

initial: *A shadow detaches itself from the corner booth*
I've been watching you since you entered, friend.
You move like someone with purpose - and secrets.
In my line of work, that makes you... interesting.
pre_mayor: I work freelance, but even I follow certain rules.
The Mayor's been cracking down on 'unofficial' activities.
Get his blessing first, then we'll talk business.
post_mayor: *sheathes her dagger with a smooth motion*
So the Mayor vouched for you - impressive.
He mentioned you need someone with... specialized skills.
Locks, traps, information gathering - all part of my repertoire.
post_recruitment: Good mix of skills in this group.
We should handle most situations, legal or otherwise.
Just point me at the locks and leave the sneaking to me.
party_full: Smart to keep your numbers manageable.
Stealth becomes impossible with too many footsteps.
already_recruited: Ready for whatever locks or traps await us.
Lead the way - quietly, I hope!
